nodes.name: Extract Chunks
nodes.notes: Split each chunk into separate items for processing

nodes.name: Webhook — Receive from Databricks
nodes.notes:
Endpoint: POST /webhook/policy-ingest
Databricks sends batch chunks here

nodes.name: Telegram Trigger — User Question
nodes.notes:
Create a bot via @BotFather on Telegram.
Paste the API token into n8n credentials.

nodes.name: Extract Message
nodes.notes: Extract chat_id and question text from Telegram payload

nodes.name: Check /start Command
nodes.notes: If user sends /start, reply with welcome message

parameters.text:
={{ `👋 Hi ${$json.first_name}! I'm your Company Policy Assistant.

Ask me anything about our company policies — leave, IT, code of conduct, and more.

Example questions:
• How many annual leave days do I get?
• What is the IT equipment policy?
• What is the dress code policy?` }}

nodes.name: Send Loading Message
nodes.notes: Send a temporary message so the user knows the bot is processing

nodes.name: Gemini — Embed Question
nodes.notes:
Embed user question into a 768-dimension vector
Add your Gemini API key to n8n credentials (HTTP Query Auth, name: key)

parameters.text: Sorry, I couldn't find anything related to your question in our policy documents. Please contact HR directly for assistance.

nodes.name: Send Answer to Telegram
nodes.notes: Send final answer to user on Telegram

nodes.name: Save to Qdrant
nodes.notes:
Replace YOUR_QDRANT_IP with your Qdrant container IP.
Run: docker inspect qdrant | grep IPAddress

nodes.name: Qdrant Search
nodes.notes:
Replace YOUR_QDRANT_IP with your Qdrant container IP.
Run: docker inspect qdrant | grep IPAddress

nodes.name: Groq — Generate Answer
nodes.notes:
Replace YOUR_GROQ_API_KEY_HERE with your Groq API key.
Get a free key at: https://console.groq.com
